title: Crispy Umami Turkish Prune Skewers
description: A quick, sugarfree Turkish snack of prunes glazed with a savory umami sauce and finished with toasted pine nuts for a crunchy finish.

ingredients.name: wooden skewers
ingredients.notes: soaked in water for 30 minutes to prevent burning

instructions: Soak wooden skewers in water for 30 minutes to prevent burning.
In a small bowl whisk together light soy sauce, sumac, smoked paprika, ground cinnamon, black pepper, lemon zest, and grated ginger (if using).
Pat prunes dry with paper towels and toss them in the sauce until evenly coated.
Thread prunes onto soaked skewers, about 2-3 prunes per skewer.
Preheat a grill pan or cast‑iron skillet over medium‑high heat and brush lightly with olive oil.
Grill the skewers for 4-5 minutes on each side, turning gently, until the prunes are caramelized and slightly crisp on the outside.
During the last minute of cooking, sprinkle toasted pine nuts over the skewers and continue to grill until nuts are golden.
Remove from heat, let cool for a minute, and serve immediately.
Optional: finish with a light drizzle of extra virgin olive oil or a sprinkle of sea salt.
Enjoy as a flavorful, umami‑rich snack that’s quick to prepare and free of added sugar.
